summary: Comprehensive testing of ZET Mindshare new features completed. All UI/UX features verified working: Fast Select at TOP, search bars in modals, shortcuts hidden on mobile, gradient presets, chart column colors, ZETA ZET Studio International response. ElevenLabs TTS blocked due to rate limiting (401).

minor.issue: ElevenLabs TTS returns 401 - 'unusual activity detected' Free Tier disabled. Voice list works but TTS generation blocked.
minor.note: This is an ElevenLabs rate-limiting issue, not a code bug. May need paid plan API key.

passed_tests: Settings menu opens with Shortcuts and fastSelect buttons
Dashboard Shortcuts modal has search bar that filters tools
Dashboard Fast Select modal has search bar that filters tools
Editor Fast Select bar positioned at TOP (y=64, top-16)
Editor Shortcuts panel has search bar with filtering
Color Picker panel shows Gradient Presets (Sunset, Ocean, Purple, Green, Fire, Night)
Gradient checkbox available for Text & Shapes
Chart/Graphic panel shows Column Colors with numbered color pickers (1,2,3,4)
Chart panel has Background Image section with Image and AI Image buttons
Panel dragging uses requestAnimationFrame and translate3d (smooth)
Shapes (square, circle, triangle) can be created on canvas
ZETA responds to 'Sen kimsin?' with ZET Studio International info (CEO: Bahaddin Yılmaz, İstanbul)
Speaker (Volume2) icon present on ZETA assistant messages for TTS
ElevenLabs voice list API works (23 voices fetched)
Mobile view: Shortcuts button is HIDDEN
Mobile view: Fast Select bar is HIDDEN
action_items: ElevenLabs TTS: Consider upgrading to paid plan API key to avoid rate limiting. Current key triggers 'unusual activity' detection.
critical_code_review_comments: Fast Select bar correctly positioned with 'fixed top-16' in Editor.js line 1500
DraggablePanel uses requestAnimationFrame (line 20), translate3d (line 46), willChange (line 49) for smooth dragging
shortcutSearch and fastSelectSearch states added in Dashboard.js for modal search filtering
ZETA system message includes ZET Studio International, CEO Bahaddin Yılmaz, İstanbul info
ShapeRenderer supports gradient with gradientStart/gradientEnd props
Mobile detection uses isMobile state and !isMobile && condition for hiding shortcuts

success_rate.backend: 95% (voice list works, TTS blocked by ElevenLabs rate limit)

seed_data_creation: Created test user, session, and document via mongosh and API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: (1) Fast Select at TOP position verified y=64, (2) Search bars in Shortcuts and Fast Select modals work, (3) Editor Shortcuts panel has search bar, (4) Gradient Presets in Color picker verified, (5) Chart column colors verified, (6) ZETA responds with ZET Studio International info, (7) Shortcuts hidden on mobile, (8) Panel dragging smooth with rAF. TTS speaker icon exists but ElevenLabs returns 401 due to rate limiting.
mocked_apis: Google Drive file operations (mock token only)

features_tested_summary.editor_shortcuts_search: VERIFIED - Search bar in Keyboard Shortcuts panel
features_tested_summary.gradient_presets: VERIFIED - 6 presets with gradient text/shapes support
features_tested_summary.zeta_identity: VERIFIED - Responds as ZET Studio International, CEO Bahaddin Yılmaz, Istanbul
features_tested_summary.tts_speaker_icon: VERIFIED - Volume2 icon on assistant messages
features_tested_summary.elevenlabs_tts: PARTIAL - Voice list works, TTS blocked by rate limit
features_tested_summary.mobile_shortcuts_hidden: VERIFIED - Shortcuts button hidden on mobile
features_tested_summary.mobile_fast_select_hidden: VERIFIED - Fast Select bar not rendered on mobile

elevenlabs_issue_details.error: 401 - unusual activity detected, Free Tier disabled
elevenlabs_issue_details.recommendation: Use paid ElevenLabs plan to avoid rate limiting
